================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 CD AB DA CC 8A
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x43
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 42

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x43
PayloadLen   : 42

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]

16 C4 8B 39 2C E3 9B 3A 00 00 00 00 F0 D8 00 00 
00 00 10 27 F0 D8 00 00 00 00
